title: Jelly Squirts - Fruit Flavoured Candy Jelly, Assorted Pack, 24 Bags
features: PACK CONTENTS: Box of 24 individual bags of fruit-flavoured jelly candy, perfect for sharing or portion control
VARIETY: Assorted fruit flavours in each pack offering a delightful mix of sweet and tangy jelly treats
CONVENIENT PACKAGING: Individual bags ensure freshness and make these sweets ideal for lunchboxes or on-the-go snacking
COLOURFUL TREATS: Vibrant, multi-coloured jellies that make these sweets visually appealing and fun to eat
PARTY PERFECT: Ideal for party bags, holiday treats, or as a sweet reward with individually wrapped portions
description: Product description Indulge in the burst of fruity fun with Jelly Squirts, a delightful assortment of fruit-flavoured jelly candies that bring excitement to every bite. Each convenient multipack contains 24 individual bags, perfect for sharing at parties, tucking into lunchboxes, or keeping as sweet treats for any occasion. These colourful jellies come in an array of vibrant fruit flavours that will tantalise your taste buds. The playful packaging features eye-catching designs with splashes of colour that hint at the fruity adventure within. Each bag contains a generous portion of these chewy, fruit-flavoured jellies that are sure to satisfy your sweet cravings. The convenient individual packaging makes these treats ideal for on-the-go snacking or as party favours. Whether you're stocking up for a celebration or simply love having a stash of sweets on hand, this 24-pack of Jelly Squirts offers great value and endless moments of sugary delight. Ingredients Sugar, Glucose Syrup, WHEAT Flour, Maize Starch, Fruit and Vegetable Juice Concentrates 1.5%(Apple, Black Carrot), Acidity Regulators (Citric Acid, Malic Acid), Palm Oil, Flavouring, Emulsifier (Mono and Di-glycerides of Fatty Acids).
